description: Style Note Gear up your little hero for his everyday adventures with this pair of flip-flops from ben 10. Featuring an attractive print on its footbed, this pair will easily capture his heart. Pair it with a cotton tee and shorts for an outing in the park. Product Details Fluorescent green flip-flops with attractive print and branding on footbed Black thong style straps with brand badge Foamy rubber footbed Patterned nubs on outsole Material and Care Rubber  Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust  Do not store under sunlight  Style NoteGear up your little hero for his everyday adventures with this pair of flip-flops from Ben 10.
